examples: Their festival was called Saturnalia which began the middle of December and ended January 1st.
One week before the winter solstice, Romans began celebrating Saturnalia, an orgy of food and drink, in honor of Satyr, the god of agriculture.
In ancient and early Medieval times, Christmas was either a minor feast, or not celebrated at all. the Romans had a winter celebration known as Saturnalia.
The Roman feast of Saturnalia was a weeklong winter solstice party that overturned social norms, including masters served slaves.
